docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BOYD,MARK AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
